text.title: AR Design Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply AR Design Patterns end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: scope-environment
step.action: Identify expected environments (indoor / outdoor / mixed) and primary input modalities.

step.name: spec-anchoring
step.action: Pin anchor type (plane / feature / image-target) per UI element.
step.decision-gate: If any element is world-locked without anchor, STOP.

step.name: set-contrast-tokens
step.action: Define per-environment contrast tokens; specify the runtime switch.

step.name: input-alternates
step.action: If dwell/gaze is used, add discrete trigger alternate.

step.name: motion-and-audio
step.action: Budget animation per session; spec reduced-motion alternate; pair critical notifications with spatial-audio cues.
